name: I live in Houston, is there a time limit to sue over AI visibility messing up my lawyer search?
description: 2-3 years in TX from discovery—consult local attorney ASAP.[1]

mainEntity.name: I live in Houston, is there a time limit to sue over AI visibility messing up my lawyer search?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2-3 years in TX from discovery—consult local attorney ASAP.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Statutes of limitations vary: 2-3 years for malpractice or misrepresentation claims in Texas, starting from discovery.[1] No specific AI visibility cases yet, but general consumer protection laws apply.[4] Key factors: prove harm from reduced visibility (e.g., lost clients); jurisdiction-specific deadlines; fraud tolling possible.[1] Consult local bar for exact SOL; gather proof of reliance and damages promptly; file before deadline lapses.[1] Act within 1 year to be safe.
